summary: Despite a weak market, six BSE 150 MidCap stocks, including Sona BLW Precision and Gujarat Fluorochemicals, hit fresh 52-week highs, gaining up to 20% over the past month.

title: Market wrap: Trent, Axis Bank among top gainers and losers on Nifty and Sensex today
summary: Indian equities ended lower as escalating Iran-US tensions and surging crude prices dampened investor sentiment despite easing volatility. Banking stocks dragged benchmarks, while analysts expect geopolitical risks, inflation concerns and Q1 earnings momentum to shape market direction, with Nifty support at 24,100 and resistance near 24,400.

title: Mrs Bectors Food shares surge 25% in 3 days after Sunil Singhania's Abakkus picks up  stake
summary: Mrs Bectors Food Specialities shares surged on Monday, extending their three-day gains to over 25% after Sunil Singhania's Abakkus Investment Managers acquired a nearly 1% stake through a bulk deal. Investors cheered the marquee investment even as the company awaits its June quarter earnings announcement.

title: ​Multibagger smallcaps: FIIs raised stakes in these 14 stocks for 2 straight quarters; shares soared up to 450%
summary: Foreign institutional investors raised stakes in these smallcap stocks for two straight quarters, and the strategy paid off as select names delivered multibagger returns of up to 450% in six months.

title: Som Distilleries shares jump 14% as ace investor Prashant Jain buys 25 lakh shares in Q1. What is he seeing?
summary: Shares of Som Distilleries surged after veteran investor Prashant Jain acquired a 1.22% stake in the company during the June quarter, according to the latest shareholding data. The investment boosted investor sentiment despite the liquor maker reporting weak earnings in the previous quarter.

title: Aastha Spintex sets board meeting date to consider and approve 1:1 bonus shares, 100% final dividend
summary: Aastha Spintex's board will meet on July 23 to discuss a bonus issue and a final dividend for shareholders. The proposed bonus involves issuing new shares and reflects confidence in the company's growth following an acquisition to expand spinning capacity.

title: Sobha Q1 Results: Revenue rises 50%, profit more than triples as margins improve
summary: Sobha Ltd. reported a strong June 2026 quarter with a 50% year-on-year revenue rise to  ₹1,278.2 crore and a net profit tripling to  ₹50.8 crore. Despite a 35.7% sequential revenue decline, operating margins improved significantly.

title: Top Gainers & Losers on 20 July: Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, Ceat, India Cements, OLA, HFCL among top losers
summary: The Indian stock market faced pressure on 20 July as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East weighed on investor sentiment. Rising crude prices stoked fears of tighter monetary policies, while mixed sector performances were seen. Despite losses, heavyweight stocks helped Nifty 50 end down 0.40%.

title: Indian Overseas Bank share price rise 3% after Q1 results 2026. Do you own?
summary: IOB share price opened at  ₹34.14 apiece today, as compared to previous close of  ₹33.81 on Friday last week.

title: Global customers are watching closely, says Skyroot founder Pawan Chandana
summary: This is a global milestone achieved by an Indian private company, and it demonstrates to the entire ecosystem that building world-class space technology in India is possible, Skyroot founder Pawan Chandana said

summary: The new Aadhaar app achieved 40 million downloads so far. The redesigned app replaces mAadhaar aap and offers a wide range of Aadhaar-related services. Full list here.
